[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10100011 4
1 00000001 1
2 00100000 1
3 11101101 6
4 01110011 5
5 01110000 3
6 11110100 5
7 01100010 3

01 10 11110100 5 match 6
12 21 11110110 6
23 32 11100011 5
34 43 10100011 4 match 0
45 54 00100001 2
56 65 11101101 6 match 3
67 76 11111111 a
70 07 01110011 5 match 4

13 31 11110111 7
